title: Add multi-language support (EN/ES/FR/PT/DE/TR/RU/VI/KO/NL)

requirements.text: Add translations for Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Turkish, Russian, Vietnamese, Korean, and Dutch to frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts alongside the existing English strings, covering all existing translation keys (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.).

quotes: the whole original website's language is English but you can change it to Spanish, French, portuguese, German, Turkish, russian, Vietnamese, Korean, dutch

acceptanceCriteria: translations.ts exports locale entries for: en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl
All existing English translation keys are present in each new locale
Missing keys fall back to English as defined in TranslationContext

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext.tsx to support all ten locales (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl), ensuring the translation function `t` resolves strings from the correct locale based on the user's language setting and falls back to English for missing keys.

quotes: you can change it to Spanish, French, portuguese, German, Turkish, russian, Vietnamese, Korean, dutch

acceptanceCriteria: TranslationContext accepts and resolves all ten supported locale codes
Switching language updates all translated strings in the UI
Any missing key in a non-English locale falls back to the English value

requirements.text: Update the language selector in frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx to list all ten supported languages — English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Turkish, Russian, Vietnamese, Korean, and Dutch — and persist the selected language via the existing useAccountSettings language mutation so it is reflected app-wide.

quotes: you can change it to Spanish, French, portuguese, German, Turkish, russian, Vietnamese, Korean, dutch

acceptanceCriteria: Settings page language dropdown lists all 10 languages with their native names
Selecting a language saves the preference and the entire UI re-renders in the chosen language

requirements.text: Update the backend language setting in backend/main.mo to accept and store all ten locale codes (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl) in UserSettings, replacing or extending any previous single-language field.

quotes: you can change it to Spanish, French, portuguese, German, Turkish, russian, Vietnamese, Korean, dutch

acceptanceCriteria: UserSettings.language field accepts any of the ten locale codes
Existing records without a language field default to 'en' on read
setLanguage and getLanguage (or equivalent) backend methods handle all ten locales without error

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
English must remain the default language
All locale additions must be purely additive — no existing English strings may be removed or renamed
nonGoals: Adding any language beyond the ten specified (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl)
Backend migration file unless the UserSettings schema change requires one
